tasks.description: Update LLM prompt in supabase/functions/ai-generate-effect/templates.ts: (1) Add params to EFFECT_COMPONENT_CONTRACT type definition. (2) Update OUTPUT_RULES to instruct LLM to output '// DESCRIPTION:' and '// PARAMS:' metadata lines with per-parameter descriptions. (3) Replace extractEffectCode() with extractEffectCodeAndMeta() that parses code, description, and parameterSchema. Keep extractEffectCode() as thin wrapper. Parsing must be resilient to whitespace/fence variations — test with 2-3 real generations.
tasks.executor_notes: Updated `supabase/functions/ai-generate-effect/templates.ts` to include `params` in the effect contract and require `// DESCRIPTION:` plus `// PARAMS:` metadata in generated output. Added `extractEffectCodeAndMeta()` with markdown-fence stripping, balanced JSON-array extraction for params, metadata-range removal before code validation, and empty-string/empty-array fallbacks for missing or malformed annotations; `extractEffectCode()` now delegates to the new parser. Verified with the focused edge test file and a direct three-sample parser probe covering inline params, fenced multiline params, and malformed JSON fallback.

tasks.description: Update EffectCreatorPanel (src/tools/video-editor/components/EffectCreatorPanel.tsx): (1) Update response type to include parameterSchema and description. (2) Add state for parameterSchema, previewParamValues, generatedDescription. (3) On generation: store schema, init defaults via getDefaultValues, store description. (4) On edit load: load schema/description from editingEffect. (5) Update resetForm. (6) Save metadata with generatedDescription (fallback to prompt.trim()). (7) Update onSaved signature to pass defaultParams. (8) Render ParameterControls below preview when schema is non-empty. (9) Display generatedDescription as read-only text above preview.
tasks.executor_notes: Updated `EffectCreatorPanel` to consume the richer edge-function response, maintain `parameterSchema`, `previewParamValues`, and `generatedDescription` state, load schema/description from `editingEffect`, reset them on form reset, preserve prompt text after generation for iterative editing, save metadata with `generatedDescription` fallback to `prompt.trim()`, and pass schema default params through the widened `onSaved` callback. The panel now renders the generated effect description above preview and `ParameterControls` below preview when schema exists. Repo type check passed.

tasks.description: Wire parameter controls and defaults into ClipPanel (src/tools/video-editor/components/PropertiesPanel/ClipPanel.tsx). Part A — defaults at all 4 apply sites: (1) Entrance dropdown onValueChange (~L135), (2) Exit dropdown onValueChange (~L172), (3) Continuous dropdown onValueChange (~L209) — each looks up resource schema and includes getDefaultValues in params. (4) onSaved callback (~L260) uses defaultParams from EffectCreatorPanel. Part B — render ParameterControls for each category when custom effect has non-empty schema. Wire values to `{...getDefaultValues(schema), ...clip.entrance?.params}` to handle schema evolution. Wire onChange to update clip params.
tasks.executor_notes: Updated `src/tools/video-editor/components/PropertiesPanel/ClipPanel.tsx` so all four apply sites now write default params for custom effects: the entrance, exit, and continuous dropdown handlers each seed `params` from the selected effect schema, and the `EffectCreatorPanel` `onSaved` callback now applies `defaultParams` from the creator. Added custom-effect `ParameterControls` for entrance/exit/continuous using merged values `{...getDefaultValues(schema), ...storedParams}` to handle schema evolution safely, and each control updates clip params immediately through `onChange`. Repo type check passed, and targeted grep confirmed the default-param helpers, merged-value path, parameter controls, and widened `onSaved` callback.

watch_items: SCHEMA-MERGE: ParameterControls must merge schema defaults with stored clip params: `values={...getDefaultValues(schema), ...clip.entrance?.params}` so pre-existing clips show defaults for newly added params (addresses effect-schema-merge-gap flag).

LLM-PARSING: The // DESCRIPTION: and // PARAMS: comment parsing must handle whitespace variations, markdown fences wrapping annotations, and missing/malformed JSON. Fall back to empty string / empty array respectively.

DEBT-WATCH: clip-param-schema-evolution — do not make this worse. Component-side nullish coalescing is the accepted strategy; do not add normalization passes that could interfere with existing clip data.
DEBT-WATCH: bulk-properties-panel — BulkClipPanel imports may reference effect-related code. Ensure new imports don't break the build if ParameterControls is only used in ClipPanel.
DEBT-WATCH: legacy-effect-lifecycle — existing custom effects without parameterSchema must continue to work unchanged. All new fields are optional.
BACKWARD-COMPAT: Built-in effects receive but ignore params prop. Ensure no destructuring changes in built-in effects.
PROMPT-CLEARING: Step 6 changes the current behavior of clearing the prompt after generation. The prompt should be kept intact for iterative editing. Verify this doesn't cause UX issues.
METADATA-SAVE: The description field in saved metadata switches from prompt text to LLM-generated description. Ensure fallback to prompt.trim() if LLM produces empty description.
NO-DB-MIGRATION: All storage uses existing JSONB columns. Verify parameterSchema serializes/deserializes correctly through the resource metadata path.
EDGE-FUNCTION-TYPES: The edge function runs in Deno — ParameterDefinition type used in templates.ts must be defined locally (cannot import from src/tools).

sense_checks.question: Do ClipEntrance, ClipExit, and ClipContinuous all have the optional `params` field, and does ClipMeta in timeline-data.ts inherit them without modification?
sense_checks.executor_note: Yes. `ClipEntrance`, `ClipExit`, and `ClipContinuous` all now include optional `params?: Record<string, unknown>` in `src/tools/video-editor/types/index.ts`, and `ClipMeta` inherits them transitively through `TimelineClip['entrance'|'exit'|'continuous']` without requiring modification.

sense_checks.question: Is EffectComponentProps exported and does it have `params?: Record<string, unknown>`? Are all existing effect components unaffected (no TypeScript errors from the new optional prop)?
sense_checks.executor_note: Yes. `EffectComponentProps` remains exported from `src/tools/video-editor/effects/entrances.tsx` and now includes `params?: Record<string, unknown>`. Existing effect components were unaffected, and `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false` completed with zero errors.

sense_checks.question: Does EffectMetadata include `parameterSchema?: ParameterSchema` and is the import from video-editor types resolving correctly?
sense_checks.executor_note: Yes. `EffectMetadata` now includes `parameterSchema?: ParameterSchema` in `src/features/resources/hooks/useResources.ts`, and the import from `@/tools/video-editor/types` resolved cleanly under `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false`.

sense_checks.question: Does ParameterControls render all 4 control types correctly? Does getDefaultValues extract defaults from schema and handle missing/undefined default values?
sense_checks.executor_note: Yes. `ParameterControls` renders number via `Slider`, select via `Select`, boolean via `Switch`, and color via `Input type="color"`, with each control showing label and description. `getDefaultValues(schema)` returns explicit defaults when present and safe type-based fallbacks when they are missing or undefined.

sense_checks.question: Does extractEffectCodeAndMeta correctly parse code, description, and parameterSchema from LLM output? Does it handle missing annotations, extra whitespace, and malformed JSON gracefully with fallbacks?
sense_checks.executor_note: Yes. `extractEffectCodeAndMeta()` now parses code, description, and parameter schema while handling missing metadata, fenced output, multiline JSON arrays, extra whitespace, and malformed `// PARAMS:` content with empty-string/empty-array fallbacks. This was verified with a focused edge test run plus a three-sample direct parser probe.

sense_checks.question: Does the edge function response include all four fields: code, description, parameterSchema, model?
sense_checks.executor_note: Yes. The edge function now returns all four fields: `code`, `description`, `parameterSchema`, and `model`. This is asserted in `supabase/functions/ai-generate-effect/index.test.ts`, and the focused edge test file passed.

sense_checks.question: Does EffectCreatorPanel correctly store schema/description on generation, load them on edit, reset them on form clear, and save generatedDescription (not prompt text) as the effect description?
sense_checks.executor_note: Yes. `EffectCreatorPanel` now stores schema and generated description on generation, loads schema/description from `editingEffect`, resets them through `resetForm`, and saves `generatedDescription` instead of prompt text with a `prompt.trim()` fallback when the generated description is empty. The prompt itself is no longer cleared after generation, preserving iterative editing.

sense_checks.question: Does the preview composition pass previewParamValues to the effect component, and does it update when slider values change?
sense_checks.executor_note: Yes. `EffectCreatorPanel` preview composition now passes `previewParamValues` into the effect component via `params={effectParams}`, and the memoized `PreviewComposition` now depends on `previewParamValues`, so slider/control changes update the preview path.

sense_checks.question: Does wrapWithClipEffects pass params from clip config to entrance, exit, and continuous effect components?
sense_checks.executor_note: Yes. `wrapWithClipEffects` now passes params from clip config into continuous, entrance, and exit effect components via `params={clip.continuous?.params}`, `params={clip.entrance?.params}`, and `params={clip.exit?.params}` respectively.

sense_checks.question: Are all 4 apply sites in ClipPanel writing default params? Does ParameterControls merge `{...getDefaultValues(schema), ...storedParams}` for schema evolution safety? Does onChange update clip params immediately?
sense_checks.executor_note: Yes. All four ClipPanel apply sites now write default params: the entrance, exit, and continuous dropdowns each use schema-derived defaults for custom effects, and the `EffectCreatorPanel` `onSaved` callback applies `defaultParams`. `ParameterControls` now render with merged values `{...getDefaultValues(schema), ...storedParams}` for schema evolution safety, and each control writes updated clip params immediately through `onChange`.

sense_checks.question: Do all 3 BulkClipPanel dropdown handlers include default params for custom effects? Is there NO ParameterControls rendering in BulkClipPanel?
sense_checks.executor_note: Yes. All three BulkClipPanel effect selectors now add default params for custom effects via `getDefaultValues(schema)`, and there is no `ParameterControls` rendering in bulk mode. A grep for `ParameterControls` JSX/call sites in `src/tools/video-editor/components/PropertiesPanel/BulkClipPanel.tsx` returned no matches.

sense_checks.executor_note: Yes. `npx tsc --noEmit` completed successfully with zero errors across the modified files and the broader repository.

The deploy step was blocked because the Supabase CLI requires an access token and none is configured in this environment, so I could not create a new effect against the deployed function to confirm the response includes `parameterSchema` and `description`.

meta_commentary:
**Execution guidance:**

**Parallelism:** T1, T2 can run in parallel (independent type changes). T4 and T5 can run in parallel after T1. T9 can start as soon as T2 is done. T11 can start as soon as T4 is done.

**Critical path:** T1 → T5 → T6 → T7 → T8 → T10 → T12 → T13. The EffectCreatorPanel (T7) is the most complex task — it touches state management, save logic, UI rendering, and the onSaved callback signature.

**Edge function typing gotcha:** The edge function runs in Deno with its own type definitions. The ParameterDefinition type used in extractEffectCodeAndMeta must be defined locally in the edge function code (e.g. inline in templates.ts or a local types file). Do NOT try to import from src/tools/video-editor/types.

**Schema evolution (the open flag):** The accepted strategy is component-side defaults via nullish coalescing (`props.params?.speed ?? 1`). On the UI side, ParameterControls in ClipPanel must spread schema defaults under stored params: `values={...getDefaultValues(schema), ...clip.entrance?.params}`. This ensures newly added params show their defaults in the UI for pre-existing clips without requiring a data migration.

**LLM output parsing resilience:** The `// PARAMS:` and `// DESCRIPTION:` parsing in T5 is a key risk point. LLMs may wrap annotations inside markdown fences, add extra blank lines, or produce slightly malformed JSON. Build the parser defensively — strip fences first, search for the annotation prefixes line-by-line, and use try/catch around JSON.parse with a fallback to [].

**What NOT to change:** Built-in effects in entrances.tsx, exits.tsx, continuous.tsx — they receive but ignore `params`. No changes to DB schema or migrations. No changes to the resource storage/fetch pipeline (parameterSchema rides in existing JSONB metadata).

**Testing approach:** After T12 (type check), manually test the full loop: create effect with params → verify controls appear in creator preview → save → apply to clip → verify controls in ClipPanel → adjust params → verify render updates → reload page → verify persistence.
